name: Fairlawn Golf Course
about: Fairlawn Golf Course is an 18-hole public golf facility located in Poland, Maine. It features both a traditional outdoor course and an indoor simulator space equipped with three state-of-the-art Trackman bays. The venue maintains a peaceful, wooded atmosphere and is known for being family-friendly, with food and beverage service available at its pub. It operates as a multi-purpose facility catering to both traditional golfers and those seeking indoor simulator experiences.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman simulator technology available for public use
Combines traditional golf with modern indoor simulation options
On-site food and beverage service creates a complete golf experience
Family-friendly atmosphere suitable for all skill levels
Peaceful wooded setting provides a relaxing golf environment

food_and_drink.notes: Food available at the on-site pub
Full bar with various local and national beers on tap

simulator_hardware.notes: Three state-of-the-art Trackman bays available for public use

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players must bring their own clubs for simulator play, as there is no mention of club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside alcoholic beverages are prohibited on the property per Maine State Law, though food from the on-site pub is available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: No specific time estimate is provided for 18 holes on the simulator in the content.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly with mentions of family amenities and a welcoming atmosphere for all skill levels.
